rules.controlName: Network resources must be protected by security baseline controls
rules.description: Every network resource should be protected by at least one security baseline control.

rules.controlName: Compute resources must be protected by security baseline controls
rules.description: Every compute resource should be protected by at least one security baseline control.

rules.controlName: Storage resources must be covered by policy controls
rules.description: Every storage resource should be covered by at least one policy control.

rules.controlName: Data resources must be covered by policy controls
rules.description: Every data resource should be covered by at least one policy control.
